title: potentilla cinerea var. arenaria
intro: Potentilla cinerea var. arenaria, also known as Gray Cinquefoil, is a perennial herb native to North America, belonging to the rose family (Rosaceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be utilized to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Potentilla cinerea var. arenaria include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne, due to its antioxidant and antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
